content: 打开Bilibili，找到排行榜上播放量最大的10个视频

text:
TITLE: Find Top 10 Bilibili Videos

I'll start by checking if the BILIBILI tool is available and booting a session.

name: exec
content:
Boot successful
  Session: bili_bilibili
  State: IDLE
  URL: https://www.bilibili.com

text: Session is active. Now navigating to the ranking page to find the most-viewed videos.

name: exec
content:
Navigated to ranking
  URL: https://www.bilibili.com/v/popular/rank/all
  State: IDLE

text: On the ranking page. Let me extract the top 10 videos with their view counts.
